mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, title, content, name AS assignee_name, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (username, title, content, name, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{title}, #{content}, #{assigneeName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND username = #{username}
